scripts.test:e2e:local: pnpm -F @hostc/protocol build && pnpm -F @hostc/server build && pnpm -F hostc build && node ../../scripts/e2e-local.mjs
scripts.test:e2e:staging: pnpm -F @hostc/protocol build && pnpm -F @hostc/server build && pnpm -F hostc build && node ./scripts/e2e-staging.mjs
scripts.load:staging: pnpm -F @hostc/protocol build && pnpm -F @hostc/server build && pnpm -F hostc build && node ./scripts/load-staging.mjs
scripts.verify:staging: pnpm run preflight:staging && pnpm run test:e2e:staging
